page: Microsoft Azure E64ds_v7 is an Edsv7-family virtual machine running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated vCPUs built on the x86_64 architecture with Intel processors. The instance is equipped with 512.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU.

This server configuration includes 3780 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, allowing for high-throughput disk operations. It does not include any graphics processing units or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

The high memory density of 8.0 GB per core makes this instance class suitable for memory-intensive workloads. The inclusion of substantial local storage provides a resource-dense environment for applications requiring fast temporary disk access, though the lack of GPU acceleration limits its utility for machine learning training. This hardware profile is designed for enterprise databases, large-scale memory-cached applications, and data processing workloads.
description: Microsoft Azure E64ds_v7 is an Edsv7-family virtual machine configured with 64 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs powered by Intel processors and managed via the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 512.0 GB of system memory, establishing an 8.0 GB per vCPU ratio that aligns with memory-optimized resource requirements. For storage-heavy operations, the instance includes 3780 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage, though it lacks dedicated GPU hardware and complimentary public IPv4 addresses. The high memory-to-core ratio and substantial local storage capacity offer qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring large memory footprints and fast local disk access without the overhead of external storage. This server type is configured for memory-intensive applications, enterprise database hosting, and large-scale data processing tasks.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E64ds_v7 is an Edsv7-family virtual machine featuring 64 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 512 GB of RAM, and 3780 GB of local storage, optimized for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring sixty-four dedicated cores, half a terabyte of system memory, and substantial local storage capacity.

3780 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Designed for enterprise databases and memory-intensive data processing
